creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
(In reply to Tom Vijlbrief from comment #8)

> So it only raises its head when portmaster is run for the first time.

Does this mean:
a) when *you* ran portmaster the first time
b) when portmaster is run the first time

Option b) whould imply that it should be reproducible. I could not reproduce it myself and there are no other reports. So if you choose option "a" i will close this ticket as overcome by events.
